protocol.weight_constraints_current: nonzero weights >=0.10, multiples of 0.05; leverage/gross can be high but MDD constraints dominate
protocol.strict_mdd: weighted intrabar adverse move and period-contained exits
protocol.trading_target_asset: BTC portfolio sleeves unless an entry explicitly says otherwise; external features do not change target asset.
protocol.trade_orthogonality: Diversification claims require actual executed-entry, occupied-position, and zero-filled daily marked-PnL correlation; feature activation correlation is diagnostic only.
protocol.fixed_subaccount_mdd: For overlapping BTC sleeves, combine independently funded subaccount values on one synchronized BTC OHLC clock before strict MDD; never serially merge trades or combine impossible independent favorable/adverse prices.

entries.name: Frozen rank-7 75% + Fresh Kimchi/FX 25% fixed shadow
entries.description: One preregistered diagnostic capital split between frozen annual rank-7 and the freshness-safe bidirectional Kimchi/FX sleeve. No weight grid, no rebalance, and no future reranking.
entries.evidence: Risk efficiency improves in every reported window. Over 2025-2026H1, absolute return 24.3089%, CAGR 16.6176%, synchronized strict MDD 3.5393%, ratio 4.6951, 78 component trades; ratio is +0.7417 and MDD -0.7583pp versus rank-7 under the same synchronized method, while CAGR is -0.3728pp.
entries.leakage_notes: This is not pristine OOS. The Kimchi gate used 2024 for selection and 2025/2026 had already been viewed. The 75/25 audit ran one fixed cell and did not rerank, but promotion requires newly arriving untouched data.
entries.next_action: Run exactly this spec in forward shadow. Do not optimize weights or replace the live baseline until an untouched period confirms the MDD and ratio gain.

construction_recipe.contamination_warning: Diagnostic marginal-value evidence only; require untouched forward confirmation.
construction_recipe.baseline_required: Compare against frozen annual rank-7 under the same synchronized accounting method.
